problem:
filesystem: server exits silently when an allowed_directories entry does not exist on disk. ## Summary

The `secure-filesystem-server` package (`src/filesystem/`) terminates the Node process during startup if any path passed in `allowed_directories` is missing or inaccessible. The exit produces no stderr output, no JSON-RPC error response, and no log line indicating which path was the culprit — only the host (Claude Desktop, in my case) sees an abrupt transport close.

This is a sharp edge for e (npm config set registry is not working — it seems correct per old docs)
memory_hint: Use npmrc for registry config. The old syntax was removed.
failure_without_memory: Keeps using npm config set registry which is deprecated. Endless debugging.
